title: Senate-grade ionic disruptor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Senate-grade ionic disruptors''' were anti-[[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptors]] used by [[Judicial/Legends|Judicials]] near the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. Droids could be designed to resist their charges, however.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
